checks.describe: the cluster-scope LIST pods histogram exposes cumulative le buckets — the raw material for a real p99 by bucket math
a chunked list returns a bounded page plus a continue token (the etcd-revision cursor) — pagination internals
checks.run: kubectl --context kwok-kwok-scale get pods -A --chunk-size=500 -o json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("items=%d continue=%s" % (len(d["items"]), "yes" if d["metadata"].get("continue") else "no"))'

checks.describe: apiserver_storage_objects gives a per-kind etcd inventory (pods, nodes, leases, events) — the etcd-pressure forecast board
checks.run: kubectl --context kwok-kwok-scale get --raw /metrics 2>/dev/null | grep -c '^apiserver_storage_objects{'; echo done

checks.describe: APF defines dedicated priority levels for node-high and leader-election so a list flood cannot starve heartbeats or leader election
checks.run: kubectl --context kwok-kwok-scale get prioritylevelconfigurations -o name 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' '; echo
